nodes.name: Red-backed sierra finch
nodes.summary: Red-backed sierra finch（Idiopsar dorsalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-backed sierra finch。

nodes.name: Red-backed sierra finch
nodes.summary: The red-backed sierra finch (Idiopsar dorsalis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the Southern Andean Yungas of Bolivia and northern Chile and Argentina, where its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The red-backed sierra finch (Idiopsar dorsalis) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the Southern Andean Yungas of…

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: 玻利維亞
nodes.summary: 玻利維亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联770种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、白腹拟䳍等770种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Idiopsar
nodes.summary: Idiopsar（Idiopsar）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Red-backed sierra finch、White-throated sierra finch、白翅迪卡雀。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。
